scripts.dev:clean: node scripts/clean-web-next.cjs && npm run dev -w web
scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && set PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1&& .venv\Scripts\python.exe -u -m uvicorn main:app --reload --reload-exclude storage --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --log-level info --no-access-log
scripts.dev:stack: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.dev:stack:clean: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:clean -w web" "npm run dev:api"
